debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ iIndepFun (fun i ω => i ∈ X ω) P

failed_attempts:
by
  classical
  simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn]
    using (hX.iIndepFun_comap (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s) (μ := infinitePi fun i ↦
      toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False))

by
  classical
  refine (hX.iIndepFun_measurableSpace_prod_mk ?_).comp (fun i ↦ (· i)) ?_
  · intro i
    simp [bernoulliOn, Measure.comap, Measure.map, MeasurableEquiv.setOf, measurable_pi_iff]
  · intro i
    fun_prop

by
  classical
  rcases hX with ⟨hX⟩
  simpa [bernoulliOn_eq_map] using
    (MeasureTheory.iIndepFun_comp_of_hasLaw_infinitePi (X := fun ω i ↦ i ∈ X ω) (P := P) hX)

by
  classical
  -- `X` has law `Ber(u,p)`, which is (by definition) the comap of the product measure on `ι → Bool`
  -- along `fun s i ↦ i ∈ s`, hence the coordinate events are independent.
  simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, HasLaw, Measure.map_comap] using
    (Measure.iIndepFun_comp (μ := infinitePi fun i ↦
        toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)
      (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s))

by
  classical
  have hlaw : HasLaw (fun ω i ↦ i ∈ X ω) (infinitePi fun i ↦
      toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) P := by
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, HasLaw, Measure.comap_comap] using hX
  exact hlaw.iIndepFun

by
  classical
  refine (hX.iIndepFun ?f).comp measurable_pi_lambda ?g
  · intro i
    exact MeasurableSet.indicator (by
      simpa [bernoulliOn, MeasurableEquiv.setOf, Set.mem_setOf_eq] using
        (MeasurableSet.singleton (i ∈ u) : MeasurableSet ({i ∈ u} : Set Prop)))
  · intro i
    fun_prop

by
  classical
  simpa [iIndepFun] using hX.iIndepFun_comp measurableSet_setOf

by
  classical
  simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn] using
    (hX.iIndepFun_comap_infinitePi (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s)
      (μ := fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False))

by
  classical
  have hlaw : HasLaw (fun ω i ↦ i ∈ X ω)
      (infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) P := by
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn_eq_map] using
      (hX.comap (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurableEmbedding : Set ι →ᵣ Set ι))
  exact hlaw.iIndepFun_infinitePi

by
  classical
  -- Under `Ber(u,p)`, coordinates are independent; transfer this through `HasLaw`.
  simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, HasLaw] using
    (hX.iIndepFun_of_measurableEquiv
      (MeasurableEquiv.piCongrRight fun _ ↦ MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm)
      (by
        intro i
        fun_prop)
      (by
        intro i
        fun_prop))

by
  classical
  simpa [iIndepFun] using hX.iIndepFun

by
  classical
  simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, bernoulliOn_eq_map] using
    (hX.iIndepFun_of_infinitePi fun i ↦
      toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)

by
  classical
  simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, Measure.comap, bernoulliOn_eq_map] using
    (hX.iIndepFun_comp measurableSet_mem)

by
  classical
  simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, bernoulliOn_eq_map] using
    (hX.iIndepFun_comp measurableSet_mem)

by
  classical
  simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, bernoulliOn_eq_map] using
    (hX.iIndepFun_measurableEquiv MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm)

by
  classical
  simpa [bernoulliOn] using hX.iIndepFun_comap (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s)

by
  classical
  simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn] using
    (hX.iIndepFun_comp (X := X) (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s))

by
  classical
  have hlaw : HasLaw (fun ω i ↦ i ∈ X ω) (fun ω i ↦ i ∈ ω)
      (infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) P := by
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn] using hX
  have hindep :
      iIndepFun (fun i ω ↦ (fun t i ↦ i ∈ t) (fun ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) i) P := by
    simpa using
      (hlaw.iIndepFun_comp_right
        (μ := infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)
        (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s))
  simpa using hindep

by
  classical
  have hlaw : HasLaw X Ber(u, p) P := hX
  have hmeas : Measurable (fun t : Set ι ↦ fun i : ι ↦ i ∈ t) :=
    MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable
  simpa [bernoulliOn] using
    (hlaw.iIndepFun_of_comap_infinitePi (g := fun t : Set ι ↦ fun i : ι ↦ i ∈ t) hmeas)

by
  classical
  simpa [bernoulliOn] using (hX.iIndepFun_comap fun s i ↦ i ∈ s)

by
  classical
  simpa [IsBernoulliOn] using (hX.iIndepFun fun i (s : Set Bool) ↦ {t : Set ι | (i ∈ t) ∈ s})

by
  classical
  simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn] using (hX.iIndepFun_comap fun s i ↦ i ∈ s)

by
  classical
  simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn] using
    (hX.iIndepFun (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s))

by
  classical
  rcases hX with ⟨hX⟩
  have hX' :
      (Measure.map (fun ω ↦ fun i ↦ i ∈ X ω) P) =
        infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := by
    simpa [bernoulliOn, Measure.map_comap, Function.comp] using congrArg (Measure.map MeasurableEquiv.setOf) hX
  refine (iIndepFun_iff_map_infinitePi_eq _).2 ?_
  · fun_prop
  · simpa [hX']

by
  classical
  rcases hX with ⟨hX⟩
  simpa [bernoulliOn, iIndepFun_iff] using
    (hX.iIndepFun_comap_infinitePi (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s)
      (μ := fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False))

by
  classical
  have hlaw : HasLaw (fun ω i ↦ i ∈ X ω)
      (infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) P := by
    simpa [IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn, Measure.comap, HasLaw] using hX
  have hmeas : Measurable (fun s : Set ι ↦ fun i ↦ i ∈ s) :=
    MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable
  have hmap :
      HasLaw (fun ω i ↦ i ∈ X ω)
        (infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) P := hlaw
  exact (iIndepFun_iff_map_pi_eq_prod_pi (f := fun i ω ↦ i ∈ X ω) (μ := P)).2 <| by
    intro s hs
    simpa [HasLaw, Measure.map_map, Function.comp] using congrArg (fun μ ↦ μ (Set.pi Set.univ s))
      hmap.map_eq

  simpa [ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn, bernoulliOn] using hX.iIndepFun_comap (f := fun s i ↦ i ∈ s)

  exact (hlaw.iIndepFun fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)
